understanding.inferredBusinessObjective: Create a client-facing social media management system that turns a daily batch of up to five uploaded videos into platform-specific post drafts across multiple platforms and accounts, with owner/client approval before anything is published.
understanding.targetUser: AG Digitalz operator or client social media manager responsible for turning video assets into approved multi-platform content.
successCriteria: Accept up to five video uploads per client per day in a non-live planning scope.
Generate platform-specific post drafts, captions, hashtags, titles, and account assignments without publishing.
Require explicit approval before any post can go live.
Support multiple platforms and accounts as planned entities without connecting social accounts in this dry run.
Track status from uploaded asset to draft, review, approved, scheduled, or blocked.
criticalUnknowns: Which platforms and account types are in the first supported set?
Who approves posts: AG Digitalz, the client, or both?
Should the first version include video editing/repurposing, or only post/caption/package generation around uploaded videos?
assumptions: This dry run is plan-only and must not connect social accounts, upload media to platforms, post content, use credentials, deploy, or use paid tools.
The initial system should be designed as an approval-gated workflow, not an autoposter.
Uploaded videos are treated as client content in future live scope, but no customer data or real media is used in this dry run.
The first implementation should use synthetic payloads and local/source-controlled records before any live integration.
ownerConstraints: ask at most 3 critical questions only if required

rawCommand: Make me a social media management system for a client where I can upload 5 videos per day and the system creates different posts across multiple platforms and accounts, with approval before anything goes live.
plannedOutput: Plan-only command intake record for request.
